chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Appeal No. 376 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on MA No.9808/25 2.For order on MA No.9809/25 3.For hearing of case 13.08.2025 Mr. Ghulam Akbar Uqaili, advocate for appellant Mr. Muhammad Noonari, DPG ---------- 1-2. Learned counsel for the appellant has filed two applications i.e., MA No.9808/2025 under Section 345 Cr.P.C., and MA No.9809/2025 under Section 345, on the ground that the parties have entered into a compromise as the offences relating to injuries are compoundable. The witnesses namely: i) PW-01/complainant Ali Dost Bhambro examined at Ex.11. He produced FIR at Exh. 11/A; ii) PW-02/Abdul Majeed Bhambro; being eyewitness/injured of the incident examined at Exh.12; iii) PW-03/Mushtaque Bhambro; being eyewitness of the occurrence examined at Exh.13; iv) PW-04/Safia Bhambro; being injured/eye witness of the incident examined at Exh.14; v) PW-05/Zohra; being eye witness/injured of the occurrence examined at Exh.15; vi) PW-06/Rehana; being eye witness/injured of the incident examined at Exh.16. are present in Court today. Witnesses Ali Dost Bhambro and Abdul Majeed Bhambro who are present in custody, have also filed their Affidavits in support of compromise applications. Their Affidavits have also been verified from Affidavit & Identity Branch of this Court. Their Affidavits are taken on record and copies thereof are supplied to learned APG who after hearing, has given his no objection to the said compromise. Accordingly, compromise applications are allowed. Learned counsel for the appellant also confirms that payment of Diyat amount has also been forgone by said witnesses.

Accordingly, compromise applications are allowed. Learned counsel for the appellant also confirms that payment of Diyat amount has also been forgone by said witnesses. In view of the above, this appeal is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Ashraf
